name: Universal Chat Ingestion → Phoenix Traces
description: Universal chat ingestion pipeline with format detection, normalization, and discovery sampling for unknown formats. Supports VS Code Copilot Chat with extensible format registry.

nodes.name: Detect Agent Format
nodes.notes: Fingerprint-based format detection. Registry mirrors agent-generator/src/chat-formats/registry.ts. Passes raw data through on failure for discovery step.

nodes.name: Normalize Turns
nodes.notes: Format-specific normalization. Mirrors agent-generator/src/chat-formats/normalizer.ts + formats/copilot-chat.ts. Produces UniversalTurnPayload for the Python bridge.

nodes.name: Generate Discovery Sample
nodes.notes: Discovery step: when format detection fails, generates a structural sample of the unknown JSON for offline analysis by the schema-crawler. Mirrors agent-generator/src/chat-formats/discovery.ts.
